title: ZXSpace Leaderboards
description: Compete for the highest score in ZXSpace and compare your performance with players around the world through Apple Game Center.
summary: Every wave is another opportunity to improve your score, climb the leaderboard, and defend your cities for longer.

sections.heading: Compete for the Highest Score
paragraphs: The main Apple Game Center leaderboard for ZXSpace rewards players who can survive the longest, clear the most alien waves, and achieve the highest score.
Your progress also contributes to the shared ZX Series Total Score leaderboard, allowing you to compare your performance across every supported ZX Series game.

sections.heading: Climb the Leaderboards
paragraphs: Protect your shields, defend your cities, and clear each alien wave as efficiently as possible. Longer games naturally lead to higher scores and better leaderboard positions.
Collect power-ups whenever they're safe to reach and destroy bonus UFOs to maximise your score without putting your cities at unnecessary risk.

images.caption: Compete for higher scores and defend your place on the leaderboard.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Wave Counts
featureShowcases.summary: Compete for higher scores, beat your personal best, and climb the leaderboard.
body: Every completed wave helps you improve your score and move closer to the top of the leaderboard. As your reactions, positioning, and defensive skills improve, so will your ranking.
Combined with achievements and BarkinMad Coins, the leaderboard gives you another reason to keep defending your cities and coming back for another game.
bullets: Works alongside achievements and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Every wave is another opportunity to climb the leaderboard.
